titles.title: I Gonna Stay Right Under the Blood

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I gonna stay right under the blood, I gonna stay right under the blood, I gonna stay right under the blood, Where the devil can do me no harm.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: No harm, no harm, no harm, No harm, no harm, no harm, No harm, no harm, no harm, Where the devil can do me no harm.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I gonna live right under the blood, I gonna live right under the blood, I gonna live right under the blood, Where the devil can do me no harm.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Am gonna pray right under the blood, Am gonna pray right under the blood, Am gonna pray right under the blood, Where the devil can do me no harm.
